title: Beautiful Potions
description: This resource pack redesigns the look of potions, giving both vanilla and modded ones unique, colorful bottle designs that make them easier to recognize.
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Beautiful_Potions/BH_Beautiful_Potions_header.webp) This resource pack changes the look of potions, both from vanilla Minecraft and from many of the most popular mods. The Minecraft community has long wanted potions to look more unique and recognizable. This pack aims to do exactly that by giving each potion its own distinct bottle design and visual style. The textures have been redesigned to be more colorful, clearer, and more visually appealing, making every potion stand out and easier to identify.
We have also added support for over 31 mods, including: Alex's Mobs, Apothic Atribbutes, Apotheosis, Ars Elemental, Ars Noveau, Autumnity, Ben' Sharks, Buzzier Bees, Corail Tombstone, Crabber's Delight, Deep Aether, Deeper and Darker, Ecologics, Eternal Starlight, Friends & Foes, Goblin Traders, Hybrid Aquatic, Illager Invasion, Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks, Kobolds, Mowzie's Mobs, Mutant Monster, Occultism, PotionsMaster, Stalwart Dungeons, Supplementaries, The Bumblezone, The Undergarden, Untitled Duck, Upgrade Aquatic and Yung's Cave Biomes.
Requires **[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)** or **[Forge CIT](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forge-cit)** (also works with OptiFine). The designer of these textures is Arkadya. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Beautiful_Potions/BH_Beautiful_Potions_description.webp) The goal of Beautiful Potions is simple: to transform Minecraft potions into a visual spectacle, replacing their standard bottles with varied, thematic designs that enhance their charm. Each potion will feature a bottle style and color scheme tailored to its specific effect, along with unique details that make them stand out even more. We’re confident you’ll love these stunning new designs! ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Beautiful_Potions/BH_Beautiful_Potions_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this resourcepack be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Beautiful_Potions/BH_Beautiful_Potions_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1W3D7TU2/images/f2cceac858a259f739aac69a4a926ac8ae5a8ef2.png) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1W3D7TU2/images/0400d3129fc4f6f0a376ff020797fce015da2d45.png) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1W3D7TU2/images/0465440128765d5b9792892eb04968b0e13c3e7f.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
